text:
- No other primary payer besides Medicare
E_BUYIN_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part A and/or B Entitlement Indicator. January through December 0 - Not Entitled
1 - Part A Only
2 - Part B Only
3 - Part A and Part B
A - Part A, State Buy-in
B - Part B, State buy-in
C - Parts A and B, State Buy-in
E_MEDICAREMA_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Managed Care (Medicare Advantage; MA) Indicator. January through December 0 - Not a member of HMO
1 - Non lock-in, HCFA to process provider claim
2 - Non lock-in, GHO to
